name: Finfish Farming and Fish Hatcheries
rationale: Top-ranked on incumbent vulnerability (8.40) because ~80% of RAS installations operate with no real-time flow visibility, and ODI (6.07) reflects life-safety opportunities (Opp=18 for flow-failure detection, Opp=15-18 per-tank visibility). Two low-cost mitigable constraints only.
entryStrategy: 1) Target 2-3 flagship land-based RAS operators (Atlantic Sapphire, Salmon Evolution, AquaMaof installs). 2) Prove <60s flow-failure detection under 2% bubble load. 3) Publish RAS case study. 4) Partner with RAS integrators (Billund, Krueger Kaldnes, AKVA). 5) Scale via OEM integration.
